response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-01:14: Identified vocal song "JAPANの美術史♪お・ぼ・え・ま・SHOW!" performed by Raden. 2. Performed search for lyrics using the song title and "lyrics" / "歌詞". No results found, indicating it is an original song. 3. Transcribed lyrics directly from on-screen display in the video. 4. 01:14-05:00: Identified as talking segment with no vocal music.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a 3D performance of the song "JAPANの美術史♪お・ぼ・え・ま・SHOW!" by Raden, followed by a talking segment where Raden discusses a piece of art titled "八橋蒔絵螺鈿硯箱" (Eight-Bridge Inkstone Box with Mother-of-Pearl Inlay).

scenes.description: Raden performs her original song "JAPANの美術史♪お・ぼ・え・ま・SHOW!" on a stage with a screen displaying images of various artworks as she sings about them.
scenes.song_title: JAPANの美術史♪お・ぼ・え・ま・SHOW!
